scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:tnp" "npm run dev:matching" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate:auth && npm run prisma:generate:tnp
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run prisma:migrate:auth && npm run prisma:migrate:tnp
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --workspace=api-gateway --workspace=services/auth-service --workspace=services/tnp-core-service --workspace=services/matching-service --if-present
scripts.start:production: concurrently "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:tnp" "npm run start:matching"
